name: X-Golf Bloomington
about: X-Golf Bloomington is a modern indoor golf facility featuring state-of-the-art simulators designed for play, training, and entertainment. The venue offers golfers the opportunity to play famous courses from around the world in a climate-controlled environment, with technology providing high accuracy and realism. Pricing is structured per bay, per hour, with various membership options available for frequent players. It caters to a wide range of patrons, from casual golfers looking for a fun night out to serious players seeking to improve their game with professional coaching.
why_golfers_like_it: World's most accurate golf simulator technology with camera systems, infrared lasers, and impact sensors
Full bar and food service available, making it ideal for both practice and social events
Flexible booking system with options for casual play, leagues, lessons, and private parties

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen available with a food menu
Full bar with beer and liquor available

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club rental is available. The simulators have built-in tees, so no need to bring your own.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: No, the venue has a full kitchen and bar available for food and beverages.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: An individual player can finish 18 holes in about one hour. For multiple players, add an hour per additional person.

faq.question: Is it kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, children of all ages are welcome, and junior lessons are available.
